history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person stands leaning against a lamppost on a city street at night. They are wearing a grey hoodie with the word "LAST" in large, bold, dark lettering across the chest, with one sleeve casually pulled off one shoulder. Underneath the hoodie, a black t-shirt is visible. They are also wearing very wide-leg, dark-wash denim jeans that are slightly frayed at the hem, and black and white Adidas sneakers. The person is covering their face with their right hand, obscuring their features.

The background depicts a street scene at dusk or night. There's a road with white lane markings and orange traffic cones lining the side. A grey fence runs along the far side of the road, with some greenery and trees behind it. In the distance, city buildings are illuminated, with a construction crane visible amongst them. The streetlights cast a warm glow, and the overall lighting is dim, creating a moody atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by dark blues, greys, blacks, and the warm orange of the cones and distant lights. The style leans towards streetwear or a casual urban aesthetic.
